title: PvPPerfected
description: This modpack is built for fast PvP and a smooth, lag-free experience. It includes all the essential tools you need for high speed and better gameplay without any unnecessary bloat.
body:
![pvpperfected](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04bca130123454705cbdcb1b0657b93c236e836d.png)

PvP Perfected

Minecraft: 1.21.11   |   Loader: Fabric   |   Profile Type: PvP + Optimization + Visuals

--- ## Quick Navigation - [Overview](#overview) - [What Makes It Different](#what-makes-it-different) - [Feature Pillars](#feature-pillars) - [Included Mod Stack](#included-mod-stack) - [Privacy and Share Safety](#privacy-and-share-safety) - [Contributing](#contributing) ## Overview **PvP Perfected** is a purpose-built client profile for players who care about reaction time, visual clarity, and consistent framerate under pressure. It combines combat-focused quality-of-life mods, modern optimization tooling, and curated UI/texture enhancements into one practical setup. ## What Makes It Different | Area | Default Client Feel | PvP Perfected | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | Combat Readability | Basic feedback | Clear status overlays, shield/totem awareness, cleaner hit readability | | Performance | Variable in crowded scenes | Tuned for smoother frametimes and lower stutter | | Menus/UI | Mostly vanilla | Customized menu flow and polished interface elements | | Visual Fidelity | Standard assets | Shader-ready pipeline with improved model/texture support | ## Feature Pillars ### 1. PvP Utility - Better crosshair control and combat visual consistency. - Shield state reliability and clearer defense feedback. - Potion and status visibility improvements. - Totem and armor tracking for decision-making during fights. - Fast zoom/camera access for positioning and target checks. **Key mods:** Crosshair Addons, Shield Status, Shield Fixes, Potion Counter, Totem Counter, Ukus Armor HUD, Zoomify, BetterHurtCam, Status Effect Bars. ### 2. Optimization Core - Rendering and simulation optimizations for PvP conditions. - Better memory efficiency and reduced overhead. - Entity and geometry culling improvements. - Smoother long-session behavior and reduced background cost. **Key mods:** Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, EntityCulling, MoreCulling, Dynamic FPS, FastQuit, Clumps, Reese's Sodium Options. ### 3. Visual and UI - Shader support with flexible graphics tuning. - Expanded entity model/texture support for resource packs. - Heavily customized menu and title presentation. - Better debug and profile visibility for tweaking. **Key mods:** Iris, Entity Texture Features, Entity Model Features, FancyMenu, TitleChanger, BetterF3, Mod Menu, Resource Pack Overrides. ## Included Mod Stack ### PvP and Gameplay - Crosshair Addons - BetterHurtCam - Shield Status - Shield Fixes - Potion Counter - Totem Counter - Ukus Armor HUD - TierTagger - Numeral Ping - Zoomify ### Performance - Sodium - Lithium - FerriteCore - ImmediatelyFast - EntityCulling - MoreCulling - Dynamic FPS - FastQuit - Clumps ### Graphics - Iris - Entity Texture Features - Entity Model Features - FancyMenu - TitleChanger - BetterF3 - Mod Menu - Resource Pack Overrides ## Privacy and Share Safety When sharing the profile, avoid publishing personal/session files. - Do not share account/session data. - Exclude logs/cache and local-only artifacts. - Keep local worlds and command history private. ## Contributing If you are improving PvP Perfected: - Keep changes measurable and purpose-driven. - Favor performance-neutral or performance-positive additions. - Test usability in real PvP scenarios before release. ## Credits Built on top of the Fabric ecosystem and the excellent work of mod developers across optimization, UI, and PvP quality-of-life tooling.
